title: Add automation recipe to clear or set values for one or more columns based on another column value
excerpt: It will be great to be able to create a custom automation where user can either clear or set one or more column values based on another column. As an example, when status changes to X clear column A and set column B to Y…

posts.author: skmdc (SK)
posts.cookedHtml: It will be great to be able to create a custom automation where user can either clear or set one or more column values based on another column. As an example, when status changes to X clear column A and set column B to Y.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @skmdc

posts.author: skmdc (SK)
posts.cookedHtml: Not sure if the recipe criteria / clauses where recently updated or added, but when I had check the clear column clause was not available. Thanks for your reply/help above. I was trying to reset/clear the time tracking based on certain item status and can now create the automation recipe.
